de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.object_model

Interface ISymbolicObject

  • All Superinterfaces:
    ISymbolicAssociationValueContainer, ISymbolicElement
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessObject, SymbolicObject

    public interface ISymbolicObject
extends ISymbolicAssociationValueContainer

    Represents a symbolic object in an ISymbolicLayout.

    The default implementation is SymbolicObject.

    Author:
    Martin Hentschel
    See Also:
    SymbolicObject
